headline: Capital One Software of Capital One Financial (COF) Launches Databolt Connect on Databricks Marketplace
summary: Capital One Financial Corporation (NYSE:COF) is one of the most undervalued NYSE stocks to invest in. On June 16, Capital One Software, the B2B technology and data-management division of Capital One Financial, launched Databolt Connect, a new application on the Databricks Marketplace designed to facilitate secure, multi-party data collaboration. The tool enables organizations, particularly in […]
